failureClassCatalog.summary: Shell landmarks or heading hierarchy fail whole-surface accessibility proof.
Keyboard traversal or focus restore breaks selected-anchor or same-shell law.
Same-shell continuity, selected-anchor preservation, or recovery-in-place truth breaks.
Preview/runtime/publication/accessibility tuple is not exact, so smoke proof is withheld.
Compact or reflow posture forks the IA or breaks the same shell.
Reduced-motion posture changes semantic outcome instead of only changing animation.
Visual proof carries meaning that is not repeated in adjacent tables or textual parity.

accessibilityResults.landmarkExpectation: banner + main + one route-local heading hierarchy
accessibilityResults.headingExpectation: one h1 with no heading-level jumps larger than one
accessibilityResults.tableParityExpectation: Every diagram or visual summary must repeat meaning in adjacent textual or tabular form.
accessibilityResults.reducedMotionExpectation: Reduced-motion must preserve the same semantic result with non-positional transitions.
accessibilityResults.responsiveExpectation: 400% reflow must stay in the same shell using mission_stack rather than a new IA.
